content.content:
1→buildscript {
     2→    repositories {
     3→        flatDir { dirs 'libs' }
     4→    }
     5→}
     6→
     7→apply plugin: 'com.android.application'
     8→apply plugin: 'com.google.gms.google-services'
     9→apply plugin: 'kotlin-android'
    10→apply plugin: 'kotlinx-serialization'
    11→apply plugin: 'kotlin-parcelize'
    12→apply plugin: 'kotlin-kapt'
    13→apply plugin: 'org.jetbrains.dokka-android'
    14→
    15→// Apply the Crashlytics Gradle plugin
    16→apply plugin: 'com.google.firebase.crashlytics'
    17→
    18→
    19→ext {
    20→    JUMIO_VERSION = "4.10.0"
    21→    ADA_CAHTBOT_VERSION = "1.8.5"
    22→}
    23→android {
    24→    namespace "com.xuenn.bet188"
    25→    defaultConfig {
    26→        compileSdk 34
    27→        minSdkVersion 28
    28→        versionCode 1
    29→        versionName System.getenv("versionNo") as String ?: "1.0.0.20001"
    30→        multiDexEnabled true
    31→        testInstrumentationRunner 'androidx.test.runner.AndroidJUnitRunner'
    32→        flavorDimensions "env"
    33→
    34→        ndk {
    35→            // 选择要添加的对应 cpu 类型的 .so 库。
    36→            abiFilters 'armeabi', 'armeabi-v7a', 'arm64-v8a', 'x86_64', 'mips', 'mips64'
    37→            // 还可以添加 'x86_64', 'mips', 'mips64'
    38→        }
    39→
    40→        buildConfigField "String", "ADA_CAHTBOT_VERSION", "\"" + ADA_CAHTBOT_VERSION + "\""
    41→
    42→    }
    43→
    44→    sourceSets {
    45→        debug {
    46→            res.srcDirs += 'strings'
    47→        }
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    signingConfigs {
    51→        debug {
    52→            storeFile file('../../globalResource/dev/dev.keystore')
    53→            storePassword 'devkeypass'
    54→            keyAlias 'Xuenn-dev'
    55→            keyPassword 'devkeypass'
    56→        }
    57→        release {
    58→            if (new File("/Users/taptap/Library/Android/appKeystore/188/bet188.properties").exists()) {
    59→                Properties props = new Properties()
    60→                props.load(new FileInputStream("/Users/taptap/Library/Android/appKeystore/188/bet188.properties"))
    61→                storeFile file(props['RELEASE_STORE_FILE'])
    62→                storePassword props['RELEASE_STORE_PASSWORD']
    63→                keyAlias props['RELEASE_KEY_ALIAS']
    64→                keyPassword props['RELEASE_KEY_PASSWORD']
    65→                println(props['RELEASE_STORE_FILE'] + " " + props['RELEASE_STORE_PASSWORD'] + " " + props['RELEASE_KEY_ALIAS'] + " " + props['RELEASE_KEY_PASSWORD'])
    66→            }
    67→
    68→            int pos = defaultConfig.versionName.lastIndexOf(".")
    69→            int code = Integer.parseInt(defaultConfig.versionName.substring(pos + 1))
    70→            defaultConfig.versionCode = code
    71→        }
    72→    }
    73→
    74→    buildTypes {
    75→        release {
    76→            signingConfig signingConfigs.release
    77→        }
    78→
    79→        debug {
    80→            buildConfigField "boolean", "doesUseAssert", "true"
    81→        }
    82→    }
    83→
    84→    defaultPublishConfig "qatDebug"
    85→
    86→    dexOptions {
    87→        javaMaxHeapSize "4g"
    88→    }
    89→
    90→    lintOptions {
    91→        // Don't abort if Lint finds an error, otherwise the Jenkins build
    92→        // will be marked as failed, and Jenkins won't analyse the Lint output
    93→        abortOnError false
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    packagingOptions {
    97→        exclude 'META-INF/DEPENDENCIES'
    98→        exclude 'META-INF/LICENSE'
    99→        exclude 'META-INF/LICENSE.txt'
   100→        exclude 'META-INF/license.txt'
   101→        exclude 'META-INF/NOTICE'
   102→        exclude 'META-INF/NOTICE.txt'
   103→        exclude 'META-INF/notice.txt'
   104→        exclude 'META-INF/ASL2.0'
   105→        exclude 'META-INF/koin-core.kotlin_module'
   106→        exclude 'META-INF/proguard/coroutines.pro'
   107→        pickFirst 'lib/x86/libc++_shared.so'
   108→        pickFirst 'lib/x86_64/libc++_shared.so'
   109→        pickFirst 'lib/armeabi-v7a/libc++_shared.so'
   110→        pickFirst 'lib/arm64-v8a/libc++_shared.so'
   111→
   112→    }
   113→
   114→    androidComponents {
   115→        onVariants(selector().withBuildType("debug")) {
   116→            packaging.jniLibs.excludes.add("**/libhermes*.so")
   117→        }
   118→
   119→        onVariants(selector().withBuildType("release")) {
   120→            packaging.jniLibs.excludes.add("**/libhermes*.so")
   121→        }
   122→    }
   123→
   124→
   125→    productFlavors {
   126→        dev {
   127→            dimension "env"
   128→            applicationId "com.dev.bet188asia"
   129→            // Use the same setting as QAT for jpush
   130→            manifestPlaceholders = [URL_SCHEMA                : "oeeasiadev",
   131→                                    GOOGLE_OAUTH_WEB_CLIENT_ID: "822845365667-dqsmd2c020i32ddb91hrc8ropg7u2vaq.apps.googleusercontent.com",
   132→                                    FACEBOOK_OAUTH_APP_ID     : "2175244899634064",
   133→                                    FACEBOOK_OAUTH_TOKEN      : "2ef54a9af346f9475c7de1219ddf07a9",
   134→                                    JPUSH_PKGNAME             : applicationId,
   135→                                    JPUSH_APPKEY              : "7f79dbad68f519a5e00e69f9", //JPush 上注册的包名对应的 Appkey.
   136→                                    JPUSH_CHANNEL             : "developer-default"] //暂时填写默认值即可.
   137→            buildConfigField "String", "Env", "\"" + name + "\""
   138→            buildConfigField "boolean", "doesUseAssert", "true"
   139→        }
   140→
   141→        qat {
   142→            dimension "env"
   143→            applicationId "com.qat.bet188asia"
   144→            manifestPlaceholders = [URL_SCHEMA                : "oeeasiaqat",
   145→                                    GOOGLE_OAUTH_WEB_CLIENT_ID: "822845365667-dqsmd2c020i32ddb91hrc8ropg7u2vaq.apps.googleusercontent.com",
   146→                                    FACEBOOK_OAUTH_APP_ID     : "4301283683441686",
   147→                                    FACEBOOK_OAUTH_TOKEN      : "5f0be8b568501db056b402fde18ca046",
   148→                                    JPUSH_PKGNAME             : applicationId,
   149→                                    JPUSH_APPKEY              : "3d06b989a56daf61a8438be5", //JPush 上注册的包名对应的 Appkey.
   150→                                    JPUSH_CHANNEL             : "developer-default"] //暂时填写默认值即可.
   151→            buildConfigField "String", "Env", "\"" + name + "\""
   152→            buildConfigField "boolean", "doesUseAssert", "true"
   153→            isDefault = true
   154→        }
   155→
   156→        red {
   157→            dimension "env"
   158→            applicationId "com.qat_megatron.bet188asia"
   159→            manifestPlaceholders = [URL_SCHEMA                : "oeeasiared",
   160→                                    GOOGLE_OAUTH_WEB_CLIENT_ID: "822845365667-dqsmd2c020i32ddb91hrc8ropg7u2vaq.apps.googleusercontent.com",
   161→                                    FACEBOOK_OAUTH_APP_ID     : "791910786824036",
   162→                                    FACEBOOK_OAUTH_TOKEN      : "1734fb7571961f4f961bf3d004c5b676",
   163→                                    JPUSH_PKGNAME             : applicationId,
   164→                                    JPUSH_APPKEY              : "4ed6f89d0cd596d8453cac1a", //JPush 上注册的包名对应的 Appkey.
   165→                                    JPUSH_CHANNEL             : "developer-default"] //暂时填写默认值即可.
   166→            buildConfigField "String", "Env", "\"" + name + "\""
   167→            buildConfigField "boolean", "doesUseAssert", "true"
   168→        }
   169→
   170→        uat {
   171→            dimension "env"
   172→            applicationId "com.uat.bet188asia"
   173→            manifestPlaceholders = [URL_SCHEMA                : "oeeasiauat",
   174→                                    GOOGLE_OAUTH_WEB_CLIENT_ID: "822845365667-dqsmd2c020i32ddb91hrc8ropg7u2vaq.apps.googleusercontent.com",
   175→                                    FACEBOOK_OAUTH_APP_ID     : "768222482254862",
   176→                                    FACEBOOK_OAUTH_TOKEN      : "247002da8ff4e380fab687874c954eba",
   177→                                    JPUSH_PKGNAME             : applicationId,
   178→                                    JPUSH_APPKEY              : "8fa2d9c7e2d1889eea351d71", //JPush 上注册的包名对应的 Appkey.
   179→                                    JPUSH_CHANNEL             : "developer-default"] //暂时填写默认值即可.
   180→            buildConfigField "String", "Env", "\"" + name + "\""
   181→            buildConfigField "boolean", "doesUseAssert", "false"
   182→        }
   183→
   184→        prod {
   185→            dimension "env"
   186→            applicationId "com.cheesecake.orange"
   187→            manifestPlaceholders = [URL_SCHEMA                : "oeeasia",
   188→                                    GOOGLE_OAUTH_WEB_CLIENT_ID: "822845365667-rudd8j1mhrk9phqjc2kv5jns5gd5jn61.apps.googleusercontent.com",
   189→                                    FACEBOOK_OAUTH_APP_ID     : "619577957584776",
   190→                                    FACEBOOK_OAUTH_TOKEN      : "6950553bd0fbbb4dfc5e5e481e7a7693",
   191→                                    JPUSH_PKGNAME             : applicationId,
   192→                                    JPUSH_APPKEY              : "5b7f861ac554165db3fce66f", //JPush 上注册的包名对应的 Appkey.
   193→                                    JPUSH_CHANNEL             : "developer-default"] //暂时填写默认值即可.
   194→            buildConfigField "String", "Env", "\"" + name + "\""

   196→        }
   197→    }

   202→        buildConfig = true
   203→    }
   204→
   205→    applicationVariants.all { variant ->
   206→        def env = variant.productFlavors.findAll { it.dimension == "env" }*.name[0]
   207→        def taskName = "pre${variant.name.capitalize()}Build"
   208→        println "Add actions to ${taskName}: copy files for env $env."

   350→def copyFiles(env) {
   351→    println 'Copy files'
   352→    def name = project.getName()
   353→    def basePath = "$rootProject.projectDir/$name"
   354→    def originalPath = "$basePath/../../globalResource/$env/188bet/$name/"
   355→    def destPath = "$basePath/"
   356→    copyPath(originalPath, destPath)
   357→}
   358→
   359→def copyPath(originalPath, destPath) {
   360→    FileTree tree1 = fileTree(dir: originalPath)
   361→    def path = tree1.getDir().absolutePath
   362→    tree1.each { File fileOrigin ->
   363→
   364→        File fileDest = new File(destPath + fileOrigin.getAbsolutePath().substring(path.length()))
   365→        try {
   366→            project.copy {
   367→                from fileOrigin
   368→                into destPath + fileOrigin.getAbsolutePath().substring(path.length()).replace(fileOrigin.name, "")
   369→                println "copy from ${fileOrigin.absolute} to ${fileDest.absolutePath}"
   370→            }
   371→        } catch (Exception e) {
   372→            e.printStackTrace()
   373→        }
   374→
   375→        println fileOrigin
   376→        println 'to'
   377→        println fileDest
   378→    }
   379→}
   380→
   381→task aaCleanBuildFile {
   382→    doLast {
   383→        println 'Clear build'
   384→        String buildDir = getBuildDir()
   385→        println buildDir
   386→        File file = new File(buildDir)
   387→        file.deleteDir()
   388→        file = null
   389→    }
   390→}
   391→
   392→
   393→import groovy.json.JsonSlurper
   394→import org.apache.commons.codec.digest.DigestUtils
   395→
   396→task generateVersionJson {
   397→    doLast {
   398→        def inputFile = new File("Version.json")
   399→        def inputJSON = new JsonSlurper().parseText(inputFile.text)
   400→        String filePath = getBuildDir().absolutePath + "/outputs/apk/"
   401→        FileTree tree1 = fileTree(dir: filePath)
   402→        tree1.each { File outFile ->
   403→            if (outFile.getName().endsWith("release.apk")) {
   404→                if (outFile.isFile()) {
   405→                    println outFile
   406→                    String checksum
   407→                    outFile.withInputStream { ins -> checksum = DigestUtils.md5Hex(ins) }
   408→                    println checksum
   409→                    inputJSON.checksum = checksum
   410→                    inputFile.text = inputJSON.toString()
   411→                }
   412→            }
   413→        }
   414→        inputJSON.each { println it }
   415→    }
   416→}
   417→
   418→dokka {
   419→    outputFormat = 'html'
   420→    outputDirectory = "$buildDir/javadoc"
   421→}

content.content:
1→package com.xuenn.bet188
     2→
     3→import android.app.Activity
     4→import android.app.ActivityManager
     5→import android.app.Notification
     6→import android.content.Context
     7→import android.os.Build
     8→import android.os.Process
     9→import android.webkit.WebView
    10→import androidx.multidex.MultiDexApplication
    11→import cn.jpush.android.api.BasicPushNotificationBuilder
    12→import cn.jpush.android.api.JPushInterface
    13→import com.bumptech.glide.Glide
    14→import com.fingerprintjs.android.fingerprint.Fingerprinter
    15→import com.fingerprintjs.android.fingerprint.FingerprinterFactory
    16→import com.google.mlkit.common.sdkinternal.MlKitContext
    17→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.config.ConstantsBet188
    18→import com.xuenn.bet188.data.Bet188SharePreferences
    19→import com.xuenn.bet188.data.style.StyleManager
    20→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.di.diModules
    21→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.repo.StringsRepository
    22→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.AndroidUtils
    23→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.CrashReportUtils
    24→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.NetworkUtils
    25→import com.xuenn.bet188.service.DaemonJobService
    26→import com.xuenn.bet188.service.NotificationService
    27→import com.xuenn.bet188.util.GlideSvg.SvgRegistration
    28→import com.xuenn.bet188.widget.ClearOnRestore
    29→import org.koin.android.ext.koin.androidContext
    30→import org.koin.android.java.KoinAndroidApplication
    31→import org.koin.core.context.startKoin
    32→
    33→class App : MultiDexApplication() {
    34→
    35→    private val lifeCycleHandler = ApplicationLifeCycleHandler()
    36→
    37→    private val prefs by lazy { Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(this) }
    38→
    39→    override fun attachBaseContext(base: Context?) {
    40→        val wrapped = base?.let { LocaleContextWrapper.wrap(it).baseContext } ?: base
    41→        super.attachBaseContext(wrapped)
    42→    }
    43→
    44→    override fun onCreate() {
    45→        super.onCreate()
    46→        initKoin()
    47→        initCrashReport()
    48→        initLifeCycleHandler()
    49→        initJPush()
    50→        initNotificationService()
    51→        if (AndroidUtils.getEnv() != ConstantsBet188.EnvVer.PRD) {
    52→            initNetworkSetting()
    53→            initWebviewSetting()
    54→        }
    55→        initFingerprinter()
    56→        initStringsRepository()
    57→        initGlide()
    58→
    59→        // For fix MlKitContext is already initialized issue from crash log
    60→        MlKitContext.initializeIfNeeded(this)
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    private fun initGlide(){
    64→        val glide = Glide.get(this)
    65→        SvgRegistration.register(this, glide, glide.registry)
    66→    }
    67→
    68→    private fun initKoin() {
    69→        val koin = KoinAndroidApplication.create(this).androidContext(this@App).modules(diModules)
    70→        startKoin(koin)
    71→    }
    72→
    73→    private fun initCrashReport() {
    74→        CrashReportUtils(this).setupUncaughtExceptionHandler()
    75→    }
    76→
    77→    private fun initLifeCycleHandler() {
    78→        lifeCycleHandler.setApplication(this)
    79→        registerActivityLifecycleCallbacks(lifeCycleHandler)
    80→        registerActivityLifecycleCallbacks(ClearOnRestore())
    81→        registerComponentCallbacks(lifeCycleHandler)
    82→    }
    83→
    84→    private fun initJPush() {
    85→        // JPushInterface.setDebugMode(true);
    86→        JPushInterface.init(this)
    87→
    88→        // adjust JPush notification
    89→        val builder = BasicPushNotificationBuilder(this)
    90→        builder.statusBarDrawable = StyleManager.notificationIcon
    91→        builder.notificationFlags = Notification.FLAG_AUTO_CANCEL
    92→        builder.notificationDefaults = Notification.DEFAULT_SOUND
    93→        builder.statusBarDrawable = R.mipmap.ic_notification
    94→        JPushInterface.setDefaultPushNotificationBuilder(builder)
    95→        DaemonJobService.startScheduleJob(this)
    96→    }
    97→
    98→    private fun initNotificationService() {
    99→        // init Notification, we need to create notification channel after android O
   100→        NotificationService.getInstance().createChannel(this)
   101→    }
   102→
   103→    private fun initNetworkSetting() {
   104→        // for apk download
   105→        NetworkUtils.trustAllHosts()
   106→    }
   107→
   108→    private fun initWebviewSetting() {
   109→        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.P) {
   110→            val manager = (this.getSystemService(ACTIVITY_SERVICE) as? ActivityManager) ?: return
   111→            val processName =
   112→                manager.runningAppProcesses.find { it.pid == Process.myPid() }?.processName
   113→            if (!processName.isNullOrEmpty() && packageName != processName) {
   114→                WebView.setDataDirectorySuffix(processName)
   115→            }
   116→        }
   117→
   118→        WebView.setWebContentsDebuggingEnabled(true)
   119→    }
   120→
   121→    private fun initFingerprinter() {
   122→        val fingerprinter = FingerprinterFactory.create(this)
   123→        fingerprinter.getFingerprint(
   124→            version = Fingerprinter.Version.V_5,
   125→            listener = { fingerprint: String ->
   126→                prefs.fingerPrint = fingerprint
   127→            }
   128→        )
   129→    }
   130→
   131→    private fun initStringsRepository() {
   132→        val appLang = prefs.appLocaleLanguage
   133→        StringsRepository.init(this, appLang)
   134→    }
   135→
   136→    fun getCurrentActivity(): Activity? {
   137→        return lifeCycleHandler.currentActivity
   138→    }
   139→}

1→package com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.viewmodel
     2→
     3→import android.app.Activity
     4→import android.content.Context
     5→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
     6→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
     7→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
     8→import com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenParsingException
     9→import com.xuenn.bet188.R
    10→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.callback.IOAuthBaseListener
    11→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.Constants
    12→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.UiStr
    13→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.repo.BaseRepository
    14→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.repo.StringsRepository
    15→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.FirebaseHelper
    16→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.oauth.FacebookOAuthHelper
    17→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.oauth.GoogleOAuthHelper
    18→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.widget.IconNotifyDialogFragment
    19→import org.koin.core.component.KoinComponent
    20→import org.koin.core.component.inject
    21→
    22→
    23→open class BaseViewModel(private val baseRepo: BaseRepository = BaseRepository()) : ViewModel(),
    24→    IOAuthBaseListener, KoinComponent {
    25→    private val TAG: String = this.javaClass.simpleName
    26→
    27→    val progressDialogObservable = MutableLiveData<Boolean>()
    28→
    29→    private val firebaseHelper: FirebaseHelper by inject()
    30→
    31→    fun isDisplayNewTnc(context: Context): Boolean {
    32→        return baseRepo.isDisplayNewTnc(context)
    33→    }
    34→
    35→    fun isEnableReferAFriend(context: Context): Boolean {
    36→        return baseRepo.isEnableReferAFriend(context)
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    fun isMemberLogin(context: Context): Boolean {
    40→        return baseRepo.isLoginSuccess(context)
    41→    }
    42→
    43→    fun isMemberVip(context: Context): Boolean {
    44→        return baseRepo.getVipTier(context) >= Constants.UserVIPTier.VIP
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    fun vipTire(context: Context): Constants.UserVIPTier {
    48→        return baseRepo.getVipTier(context)
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    fun isEnableAccessPrivilegeClub(context: Context): Boolean {
    52→        return baseRepo.isEnableAccessPrivilegeClub(context)
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    fun isUrlNotNull(url: String?): Boolean {
    56→        return url != null
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    fun isVIPNavigationEnable(context: Context): Boolean {
    60→        return isMemberVip(context) && isEnableAccessPrivilegeClub(context)
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    override fun setProgressStatus(isInProgress: Boolean) {
    64→        progressDialogObservable.value = isInProgress
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    fun initOAuthRecord(activity: Activity) {
    68→        GoogleOAuthHelper.initRecord(activity)
    69→        FacebookOAuthHelper.initRecord(activity)
    70→    }
    71→
    72→    override fun reachOAuthLimit(context: Context) {
    73→        val notifyData = IconNotifyDialogFragment.IconNotifyObject(
    74→            R.mipmap.ic_fail_active,
    75→            StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.TITLEOAUTHLIMITREACHED),
    76→            StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.MSGOAUTHLIMITREACHED),
    77→            StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.TXTBTNCOMOK)
    78→        )
    79→
    80→        IconNotifyDialogFragment.newInstance(notifyData)
    81→            .show(
    82→                (context as FragmentActivity).supportFragmentManager,
    83→                IconNotifyDialogFragment::class.java.simpleName
    84→            )
    85→    }
    86→
    87→    override fun launchFail(e: Exception) {
    88→        if (e is GoogleIdTokenParsingException) {
    89→            firebaseHelper.logEvent(
    90→                "OAuth",
    91→                "Received an invalid google id token response,${e.message}"
    92→            )
    93→//            Toast.makeText(InitApp.getAppContext(), "GoogleIdTokenParsingException: ${e.message}", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
    94→        } else {
    95→            firebaseHelper.logEvent("OAuth", "Failed with exception: ${e.message}")
    96→//            Toast.makeText(InitApp.getAppContext(), "${e.message}", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
    97→        }
    98→    }
    99→}

1→pluginManagement {
     2→    repositories {
     3→
     4→        def artBase = System.getProperty('artifactory_virtual_contextUrl', 'http://172.16.48.29:8082/artifactory')
     5→        def repoKey = System.getProperty('artifactory_repo', 'maven-taptap')
     6→        def internalRepoUrl = "${artBase}/${repoKey}"
     7→
     8→        // check connection of internal
     9→        def isInternalUp = false
    10→        try {
    11→            def conn = new URL("${artBase}/api/system/ping").openConnection()
    12→            conn.connectTimeout = 1500; conn.readTimeout = 1500
    13→            if (conn.respondsTo('setRequestMethod')) conn.requestMethod = 'GET'
    14→            conn.inputStream?.close()
    15→            isInternalUp = !(conn instanceof HttpURLConnection) || conn.responseCode < 500
    16→        } catch (ignored) { isInternalUp = false }
    17→
    18→        // set to global values
    19→        gradle.ext.artBase = artBase
    20→        gradle.ext.repoKey = repoKey
    21→        gradle.ext.internalRepoUrl = internalRepoUrl
    22→        gradle.ext.internalUp = isInternalUp
    23→
    24→        if (isInternalUp) {
    25→            maven {
    26→                url = gradle.ext.internalRepoUrl
    27→                allowInsecureProtocol = true
    28→            }
    29→        } else {
    30→            gradlePluginPortal()
    31→            google()
    32→            mavenCentral()
    33→        }
    34→    }
    35→}
    36→
    37→include ':app'
    38→

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have enough information to provide a comprehensive overview. Let me compile the findings:

## Comprehensive Android Codebase Overview - Bet188 Application

### 1. **Top-Level Project Structure**

**Gradle Files:**
- `build.gradle` (root) - Defines build script dependencies, Kotlin 1.9.24, Koin 3.5.6, Room 2.5.2, Lifecycle 2.4.0
- `app/build.gradle` - Application-level configuration
- `settings.gradle` - Single module project (`:app`)

**Build Configuration:**
- Single module structure (no multi-module setup)
- Gradle 8.2.2, targeting SDK 34, minSdk 28
- Java/Kotlin target: Version 17
- Multi-dex enabled for large APK

**Product Flavors (5 environments):**
- `dev` - Development environment
- `qat` - QA testing (default)
- `red` - Megatron testing
- `uat` - User acceptance testing
- `prod` - Production

---

### 2. **Main Package Structure** (`com.xuenn.bet188`)

```
com.xuenn.bet188/
├── revamp/                    (454 Kotlin files - MAIN REFACTORED CODEBASE)
│   ├── model/                 (Data models & repositories)
│   │   └── data/
│   │       ├── repo/          (16+ repository classes)
│   │       ├── database/      (Room DAOs, entities, caching)
│   │       └── [data objects] (100+ model objects for API responses)
│   ├── viewmodel/             (40+ ViewModels for MVVM pattern)
│   ├── view/                  (34 feature-specific directories)
│   │   ├── account/           (Account management screens)
│   │   ├── login/             (Authentication flows)
│   │   ├── register/          (Registration process)
│   │   ├── statement/         (Transaction/betting statements)
│   │   ├── message/           (Messaging features, 23 subdirs)
│   │   ├── drawer/            (Navigation drawer)
│   │   ├── lobby/             (Main lobby/home screen)
│   │   ├── notification/      (Push notifications)
│   │   ├── livechat/          (Live support chat)
│   │   ├── forgotaccount/     (Account recovery)
│   │   └── [other features]   (maintenance, callback, product, etc.)
│   ├── viewholder/            (RecyclerView adapters & view holders)
│   ├── adapter/               (Custom adapters)
│   ├── di/                    (Koin dependency injection)
│   ├── usecase/               (Business logic layer)
│   ├── utils/                 (Utility classes)
│   │   ├── fingerprint/       (Device fingerprinting)
│   │   └── oauth/             (Google & Facebook OAuth)
│   ├── widget/                (Custom widgets)
│   ├── callback/              (Listener interfaces)
│   └── contract/              (MVP/MVVM contracts)
│
├── comm/                      (24 Kotlin files - COMMON/SHARED)
│   ├── network/               (API communication layer)
│   │   ├── ServerInterface.kt (Base API client with SPI pattern)
│   │   ├── ServerResponseHandler.kt
│   │   ├── ApiServerResponseHandler.kt
│   │   ├── ServerErrorHandler.kt & ServerErrorCode.kt
│   │   ├── DomainLookUp/      (Domain resolution utilities)
│   │   └── handler/           (Error handling)
│   ├── config/                (Global constants & configuration)
│   ├── dialog/                (Common dialogs)
│   ├── footer/                (Footer components)
│   └── [other]
│
├── activity/                  (Old legacy activities - partially migrated)
├── fragment/                  (Old legacy fragments)
├── model/                     (Old legacy ViewModels)
├── data/                      (SharedPreferences, style management)
├── service/                   (Background services)
├── util/                      (Legacy utilities)
├── widget/                    (Custom views & widgets)
├── quickmenu/
├── receiver/                  (BroadcastReceivers)
└── interfaces/                (Legacy interfaces)
```

---

### 3. **Key Architectural Patterns**

**Primary Architecture: MVVM** (Model-View-ViewModel)
- ViewModels inherit from `BaseViewModel` (extends `androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel`)
- Uses `MutableLiveData` for reactive UI updates
- Bound to Views using Android Data Binding

**Secondary Pattern Elements:**
- **Repository Pattern**: Abstraction layer for data access (16+ repositories)
- **Use Case Pattern**: Business logic encapsulation in separate layer
- **Dependency Injection**: Koin framework for DI

**Layering:**
```
View (Activities/Fragments in revamp/view/)
  ↓
ViewModel (revamp/viewmodel/)
  ↓
Repository (revamp/model/data/repo/)
  ↓
Data Sources (Network API, Local Database, SharedPreferences)
```

---

### 4. **Major Feature Areas**

| Feature Area | Directory | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| **Authentication** | `revamp/view/login/`, `register/` | User login, registration, password recovery |
| **Account Management** | `revamp/view/account/` | User profile, settings, security |
| **Statements/History** | `revamp/view/statement/` | Transaction, bet, promotion history |
| **Messaging** | `revamp/view/message/` (23 subdirs) | Inbox, compose, notifications |
| **Live Chat Support** | `revamp/view/livechat/` | Customer support integration |
| **Main UI** | `revamp/view/lobby/`, `drawer/` | Navigation, home screen |
| **Notifications** | `revamp/view/notification/` | Push notifications (JPush SDK) |
| **Identity Verification** | OAuth utils, Jumio SDK | Google/Facebook login, KYC |
| **Payments/Betting** | `revamp/view/product/` | Product selection, bet management |
| **VIP Features** | Referenced in repositories | VIP tier system with privileges |

---

### 5. **Key Dependencies from build.gradle**

**Core Android Framework:**
- `androidx.appcompat:appcompat:1.5.1`
- `androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout:2.1.3`
- `androidx.recyclerview:recyclerview:1.1.0`
- `com.google.android.material:material:1.12.0`

**Network & JSON:**
- `com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp:3.8.0`
- `com.google.code.gson:gson:2.5`

**Reactive & Coroutines:**
- `org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android:1.8.1`

**Database:**
- `androidx.room:room-runtime:2.5.2` + `room-ktx:2.5.2`

**Dependency Injection:**
- `io.insert-koin:koin-android:3.5.6`
- `io.insert-koin:koin-android-compat:3.5.6`
- `io.insert-koin:koin-androidx-compose:3.5.6`

**Firebase (Analytics & Crash Reporting):**
- `firebase-bom:33.0.0`
- `firebase-analytics`
- `firebase-crashlytics`
- `firebase-perf`

**Push Notifications:**
- `cn.jiguang.sdk:jpush:5.8.0` (JPush service)

**Identity & Compliance:**
- `com.jumio.android:core:4.10.0` + related modules (KYC/document verification)
- `com.fingerprint.android:pro:2.10.0` (Device fingerprinting)

**Authentication:**
- `androidx.credentials:credentials:1.3.0` (Google Sign-In)
- `com.facebook.android:facebook-login:16.0.0` (Facebook Auth)

**Media & UI:**
- `com.bumptech.glide:glide:4.9.0` (Image loading)
- `com.caverock:androidsvg-aar:1.3` (SVG support)
- `com.github.DImuthuUpe:AndroidPdfViewer:2.8.1` (PDF viewing)

**Utilities:**
- `org.jsoup:jsoup:1.7.3` (HTML parsing)
- `org.apache.commons:commons-text:1.11.0` (String utilities)
- `com.google.android.flexbox:flexbox:3.0.0` (Flexible layouts)

**Custom SDK:**
- `com.agilebet.sbk.mg:bet[env]:2.1.+` (Internal betting framework, environment-specific)

---

### 6. **Notable Patterns & Frameworks**

**Dependency Injection (Koin):**
- 4 main modules: `viewModelModule`, `repositoryModule`, `useCaseModule`, `utilModule`
- ViewModels injected with repositories
- Context-aware injection for Android components

**Network Layer:**
- **SPI Pattern** (Service Provider Interface) in `ServerInterface.kt`
- Base response handling with polymorphic responses
- Error code mapping with `ErrorCode` enum
- Domain lookup/resolution for dynamic server switching

**Database:**
- **Room ORM** with DAOs for:
  - Statements/transactions
  - Drafts
  - Dashboard alerts
  - Registration caches (Region, Currency)
- Caching layer abstractions (`*Cache.kt` classes)

**Local Storage:**
- `Bet188SharePreferences` singleton for SharedPreferences
- Stores: login state, VIP tier, region, language, fingerprint, OAuth keys

**Firebase Integration:**
- Crash reporting via Firebase Crashlytics
- Analytics tracking via Firebase Analytics
- Performance monitoring

**Security & Verification:**
- Device fingerprinting via `fingerprint-android` library
- Jumio SDK for identity verification (document scanning, liveness detection)
- OAuth 2.0 for Google and Facebook authentication
- Domain cipher utilities for encrypted communication

---

### 7. **The "Revamp" Directory** (High Significance)

The `revamp/` directory represents a **major architectural refactoring** with 454 Kotlin files:

**Purpose**: New MVVM architecture replacement for legacy code
- **Legacy code** remains in `activity/`, `fragment/`, `model/`, `data/`, `util/`
- **New code** in `revamp/` follows clean architecture principles
- **Gradual migration**: Both coexist during transition period

**Structure**:
- Clear separation: View → ViewModel → Repository → Data Sources
- Dependency injection throughout
- Each feature has dedicated view/viewmodel/repository
- Shared utilities and base classes
- Contract interfaces for MVP compatibility

**Key Stats**:
- 454 Kotlin files (99% of codebase)
- 40+ ViewModels for different screens
- 16+ repositories for data management
- 34 feature-specific view directories
- Comprehensive utility layer (oauth, fingerprint, validation, etc.)

---

### 8. **Build & Deployment Setup**

**Multi-Environment Configuration:**
- Each flavor has unique ApplicationID, Google OAuth Client, Facebook App ID
- JPush (push notification service) configured per environment
- Different API endpoints per environment (dev, qat, uat, prod)
- Custom resource copying per environment

**Versioning:**
- Controlled via environment variable `versionNo`
- Version code derived from last segment of version name
- Signing configs for debug and release builds

**Resource Structure:**
- 223 layout files (XMLs for UI)
- 138+ drawable resources
- 21 resource value sets (strings, colors, dimens, styles, themes)
- Support for multiple screen densities and locales

---

### Summary

This is a **mature betting/gambling platform app** (Bet188 Asia) built with:
- **Modern Android stack**: Kotlin, MVVM, Room, Koin, Coroutines
- **Clean Architecture**: Clear separation between UI, logic, and data layers
- **Multi-environment support**: Dev, QAT, UAT, Production
- **Robust backend integration**: SPI-based API client with error handling
- **Compliance features**: KYC (Jumio), device fingerprinting, OAuth
- **Real-time updates**: Firebase analytics, JPush notifications
- **Active refactoring**: Revamp directory shows migration to modern patterns

The codebase is well-structured with clear naming conventions and follows Android best practices, though it shows signs of ongoing refactoring from legacy patterns.

| **Live Chat Support** | `revamp/view/livechat/` | Customer support integration |
| **Main UI** | `revamp/view/lobby/`, `drawer/` | Navigation, home screen |
| **Notifications** | `revamp/view/notification/` | Push notifications (JPush SDK) |
| **Identity Verification** | OAuth utils, Jumio SDK | Google/Facebook login, KYC |
| **Payments/Betting** | `revamp/view/product/` | Product selection, bet management |
| **VIP Features** | Referenced in repositories | VIP tier system with privileges |

---

### 5. **Key Dependencies from build.gradle**

**Core Android Framework:**
- `androidx.appcompat:appcompat:1.5.1`
- `androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout:2.1.3`
- `androidx.recyclerview:recyclerview:1.1.0`
- `com.google.android.material:material:1.12.0`

**Network & JSON:**
- `com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp:3.8.0`
- `com.google.code.gson:gson:2.5`

**Reactive & Coroutines:**
- `org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android:1.8.1`

**Database:**
- `androidx.room:room-runtime:2.5.2` + `room-ktx:2.5.2`

**Dependency Injection:**
- `io.insert-koin:koin-android:3.5.6`
- `io.insert-koin:koin-android-compat:3.5.6`
- `io.insert-koin:koin-androidx-compose:3.5.6`

**Firebase (Analytics & Crash Reporting):**
- `firebase-bom:33.0.0`
- `firebase-analytics`
- `firebase-crashlytics`
- `firebase-perf`

**Push Notifications:**
- `cn.jiguang.sdk:jpush:5.8.0` (JPush service)

**Identity & Compliance:**
- `com.jumio.android:core:4.10.0` + related modules (KYC/document verification)
- `com.fingerprint.android:pro:2.10.0` (Device fingerprinting)

**Authentication:**
- `androidx.credentials:credentials:1.3.0` (Google Sign-In)
- `com.facebook.android:facebook-login:16.0.0` (Facebook Auth)

**Media & UI:**
- `com.bumptech.glide:glide:4.9.0` (Image loading)
- `com.caverock:androidsvg-aar:1.3` (SVG support)
- `com.github.DImuthuUpe:AndroidPdfViewer:2.8.1` (PDF viewing)

**Utilities:**
- `org.jsoup:jsoup:1.7.3` (HTML parsing)
- `org.apache.commons:commons-text:1.11.0` (String utilities)
- `com.google.android.flexbox:flexbox:3.0.0` (Flexible layouts)

**Custom SDK:**
- `com.agilebet.sbk.mg:bet[env]:2.1.+` (Internal betting framework, environment-specific)

---

### 6. **Notable Patterns & Frameworks**

**Dependency Injection (Koin):**
- 4 main modules: `viewModelModule`, `repositoryModule`, `useCaseModule`, `utilModule`
- ViewModels injected with repositories
- Context-aware injection for Android components

**Network Layer:**
- **SPI Pattern** (Service Provider Interface) in `ServerInterface.kt`
- Base response handling with polymorphic responses
- Error code mapping with `ErrorCode` enum
- Domain lookup/resolution for dynamic server switching

**Database:**
- **Room ORM** with DAOs for:
  - Statements/transactions
  - Drafts
  - Dashboard alerts
  - Registration caches (Region, Currency)
- Caching layer abstractions (`*Cache.kt` classes)

**Local Storage:**
- `Bet188SharePreferences` singleton for SharedPreferences
- Stores: login state, VIP tier, region, language, fingerprint, OAuth keys

**Firebase Integration:**
- Crash reporting via Firebase Crashlytics
- Analytics tracking via Firebase Analytics
- Performance monitoring

**Security & Verification:**
- Device fingerprinting via `fingerprint-android` library
- Jumio SDK for identity verification (document scanning, liveness detection)
- OAuth 2.0 for Google and Facebook authentication
- Domain cipher utilities for encrypted communication

---

### 7. **The "Revamp" Directory** (High Significance)

The `revamp/` directory represents a **major architectural refactoring** with 454 Kotlin files:

**Purpose**: New MVVM architecture replacement for legacy code
- **Legacy code** remains in `activity/`, `fragment/`, `model/`, `data/`, `util/`
- **New code** in `revamp/` follows clean architecture principles
- **Gradual migration**: Both coexist during transition period

**Structure**:
- Clear separation: View → ViewModel → Repository → Data Sources
- Dependency injection throughout
- Each feature has dedicated view/viewmodel/repository
- Shared utilities and base classes
- Contract interfaces for MVP compatibility

**Key Stats**:
- 454 Kotlin files (99% of codebase)
- 40+ ViewModels for different screens
- 16+ repositories for data management
- 34 feature-specific view directories
- Comprehensive utility layer (oauth, fingerprint, validation, etc.)

---

### 8. **Build & Deployment Setup**

**Multi-Environment Configuration:**
- Each flavor has unique ApplicationID, Google OAuth Client, Facebook App ID
- JPush (push notification service) configured per environment
- Different API endpoints per environment (dev, qat, uat, prod)
- Custom resource copying per environment

**Versioning:**
- Controlled via environment variable `versionNo`
- Version code derived from last segment of version name
- Signing configs for debug and release builds

**Resource Structure:**
- 223 layout files (XMLs for UI)
- 138+ drawable resources
- 21 resource value sets (strings, colors, dimens, styles, themes)
- Support for multiple screen densities and locales

---

### Summary

This is a **mature betting/gambling platform app** (Bet188 Asia) built with:
- **Modern Android stack**: Kotlin, MVVM, Room, Koin, Coroutines
- **Clean Architecture**: Clear separation between UI, logic, and data layers
- **Multi-environment support**: Dev, QAT, UAT, Production
- **Robust backend integration**: SPI-based API client with error handling
- **Compliance features**: KYC (Jumio), device fingerprinting, OAuth
- **Real-time updates**: Firebase analytics, JPush notifications
- **Active refactoring**: Revamp directory shows migration to modern patterns

The codebase is well-structured with clear naming conventions and follows Android best practices, though it shows signs of ongoing refactoring from legacy patterns.

Here's a structured overview of this codebase:

---

## Bet188 Asia - Android App Overview

### Project Summary
A **betting/gambling platform app** (Bet188 Asia) targeting markets in Southeast Asia (ID, KH regions referenced in recent commits). Single-module Android project built with modern Kotlin stack.

---

### Architecture: MVVM + Clean Architecture
```
View (revamp/view/)
  ↓
ViewModel (revamp/viewmodel/)
  ↓
Repository (revamp/model/data/repo/)
  ↓
Network (comm/network/) + Room DB + SharedPreferences
```

**DI**: Koin with 4 modules (viewmodel, repository, usecase, util)

---

### Package Structure (`com.xuenn.bet188`)

| Directory | Role |
|---|---|
| `revamp/` | **Main codebase** (454 Kotlin files) — ongoing architectural refactor |
| `comm/` | Shared networking, config, dialogs |
| `activity/`, `fragment/`, `model/` | **Legacy code** being migrated out |
| `data/`, `util/`, `widget/` | Legacy support utilities |

**`revamp/` key subdirectories:**
- `view/` — 34 feature directories (login, register, account, statement, message, lobby, livechat, notification, etc.)
- `viewmodel/` — 40+ ViewModels
- `model/data/repo/` — 16+ repositories
- `model/data/database/` — Room DAOs & entities
- `di/` — Koin modules
- `usecase/` — Business logic layer
- `utils/fingerprint/`, `utils/oauth/` — Device fingerprinting, Google/Facebook OAuth

---

### Key Libraries
| Category | Library |
|---|---|
| Networking | OkHttp 3.8.0, Gson 2.5 |
| Database | Room 2.5.2 |
| DI | Koin 3.5.6 |
| Async | Kotlin Coroutines 1.8.1 |
| Images | Glide 4.9.0 |
| Push Notifications | JPush 5.8.0 |
| KYC/Identity | Jumio 4.10.0, Fingerprint-Android 2.10.0 |
| Auth | Google Credentials, Facebook Login 16.0.0 |
| Analytics | Firebase (Analytics, Crashlytics, Perf) |
| Betting Core | Internal `agilebet.sbk.mg:bet[env]:2.1.+` |

---

### Build Environments (Product Flavors)
`dev` → `qat` (default) → `red` → `uat` → `prod`

Each has unique Application IDs, OAuth configs, and API endpoints.

---

### Notable Patterns
- **SPI-based network layer** — `ServerInterface.kt` handles dynamic domain switching (`DomainLookUp/`)
- **Caching strategy** — Room DB caches statements, registration data, alerts; `*Cache.kt` abstraction classes
- **Multi-market support** — Region/locale-based feature flags (ID, KH, etc.)
- **Active migration** — Legacy `activity/`/`fragment/` code being refactored into `revamp/` incrementally

---

### Recent Activity (from git log)
Recent commits focus on: Facebook social link updates (ID region), VIP implementation (KH market), and a **Trusted Device / Account Security** feature (`CC1-4638`) — suggesting a current feature around device verification and account security.

content.content:
1→package com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.viewmodel
     2→
     3→import android.app.Activity
     4→import android.content.Context
     5→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
     6→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
     7→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
     8→import com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenParsingException
     9→import com.xuenn.bet188.R
    10→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.callback.IOAuthBaseListener
    11→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.Constants
    12→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.UiStr
    13→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.repo.BaseRepository
    14→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.repo.StringsRepository
    15→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.FirebaseHelper
    16→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.oauth.FacebookOAuthHelper
    17→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.oauth.GoogleOAuthHelper
    18→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.widget.IconNotifyDialogFragment
    19→import org.koin.core.component.KoinComponent
    20→import org.koin.core.component.inject
    21→
    22→
    23→open class BaseViewModel(private val baseRepo: BaseRepository = BaseRepository()) : ViewModel(),
    24→    IOAuthBaseListener, KoinComponent {
    25→    private val TAG: String = this.javaClass.simpleName
    26→
    27→    val progressDialogObservable = MutableLiveData<Boolean>()
    28→
    29→    private val firebaseHelper: FirebaseHelper by inject()
    30→
    31→    fun isDisplayNewTnc(context: Context): Boolean {
    32→        return baseRepo.isDisplayNewTnc(context)
    33→    }
    34→
    35→    fun isEnableReferAFriend(context: Context): Boolean {
    36→        return baseRepo.isEnableReferAFriend(context)
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    fun isMemberLogin(context: Context): Boolean {
    40→        return baseRepo.isLoginSuccess(context)
    41→    }
    42→
    43→    fun isMemberVip(context: Context): Boolean {
    44→        return baseRepo.getVipTier(context) >= Constants.UserVIPTier.VIP
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    fun vipTire(context: Context): Constants.UserVIPTier {
    48→        return baseRepo.getVipTier(context)
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    fun isEnableAccessPrivilegeClub(context: Context): Boolean {
    52→        return baseRepo.isEnableAccessPrivilegeClub(context)
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    fun isUrlNotNull(url: String?): Boolean {
    56→        return url != null
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    fun isVIPNavigationEnable(context: Context): Boolean {
    60→        return isMemberVip(context) && isEnableAccessPrivilegeClub(context)
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    override fun setProgressStatus(isInProgress: Boolean) {
    64→        progressDialogObservable.value = isInProgress
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    fun initOAuthRecord(activity: Activity) {
    68→        GoogleOAuthHelper.initRecord(activity)
    69→        FacebookOAuthHelper.initRecord(activity)
    70→    }
    71→
    72→    override fun reachOAuthLimit(context: Context) {
    73→        val notifyData = IconNotifyDialogFragment.IconNotifyObject(
    74→            R.mipmap.ic_fail_active,
    75→            StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.TITLEOAUTHLIMITREACHED),
    76→            StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.MSGOAUTHLIMITREACHED),
    77→            StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.TXTBTNCOMOK)
    78→        )
    79→
    80→        IconNotifyDialogFragment.newInstance(notifyData)
    81→            .show(
    82→                (context as FragmentActivity).supportFragmentManager,
    83→                IconNotifyDialogFragment::class.java.simpleName
    84→            )
    85→    }
    86→
    87→    override fun launchFail(e: Exception) {
    88→        if (e is GoogleIdTokenParsingException) {
    89→            firebaseHelper.logEvent(
    90→                "OAuth",
    91→                "Received an invalid google id token response,${e.message}"
    92→            )
    93→//            Toast.makeText(InitApp.getAppContext(), "GoogleIdTokenParsingException: ${e.message}", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
    94→        } else {
    95→            firebaseHelper.logEvent("OAuth", "Failed with exception: ${e.message}")
    96→//            Toast.makeText(InitApp.getAppContext(), "${e.message}", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
    97→        }
    98→    }
    99→}

1→package com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.view.base
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.os.Bundle
     5→import android.view.LayoutInflater
     6→import android.view.View
     7→import android.view.ViewGroup
     8→import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog
     9→import androidx.databinding.DataBindingUtil
    10→import androidx.databinding.ViewDataBinding
    11→import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
    12→import androidx.lifecycle.DefaultLifecycleObserver
    13→import androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleObserver
    14→import androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner
    15→import com.xuenn.bet188.data.Bet188SharePreferences
    16→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.DialogUtil
    17→
    18→
    19→abstract class BaseBindingFragment<VB : ViewDataBinding> : Fragment(), LifecycleObserver {
    20→
    21→    private val TAG = "BaseBindingFragment --> "
    22→
    23→    protected lateinit var binding: VB
    24→        private set
    25→    val sharedPreferences: Bet188SharePreferences by lazy { Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context) }
    26→
    27→    protected lateinit var baseBindingActivity: BaseBindingActivity<VB>
    28→    private var dialog: AlertDialog? = null
    29→
    30→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
    31→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
    32→        binding = DataBindingUtil.inflate(layoutInflater, getLayoutId(), null, false)
    33→        binding.executePendingBindings()
    34→
    35→        initArgs(savedInstanceState)
    36→        initData()
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    override fun onAttach(context: Context) {
    40→        super.onAttach(context)
    41→        requireActivity().lifecycle.addObserver(object : DefaultLifecycleObserver {
    42→            override fun onCreate(owner: LifecycleOwner) {
    43→                baseBindingActivity = requireActivity() as BaseBindingActivity<VB>
    44→                owner.lifecycle.removeObserver(this)
    45→            }
    46→        })
    47→    }
    48→
    49→    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
    50→        binding.lifecycleOwner = this
    51→        initView()
    52→        return binding.root
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    open fun initArgs(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
    56→
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    abstract fun initView()
    60→
    61→    abstract fun initData()
    62→
    63→    abstract fun getLayoutId(): Int
    64→
    65→    fun showLoadingDialog(cancelable: Boolean) {
    66→        if (dialog != null) return
    67→        dialog = DialogUtil.loadingDialog(requireContext(), cancelable)
    68→    }
    69→
    70→    fun showLoadingDialog() {
    71→        if (dialog != null) return
    72→        dialog = DialogUtil.loadingDialog(requireContext(), false)
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    fun dismissLoadingDialog() {
    76→        if (isDetached) return
    77→        if (dialog != null && dialog!!.isShowing) {
    78→            dialog!!.dismiss()
    79→            dialog = null
    80→        }
    81→    }
    82→
    83→    override fun onDestroy() {
    84→        dismissLoadingDialog()
    85→        super.onDestroy()
    86→    }
    87→
    88→    open fun getAppIsEnable(): Boolean {
    89→        return sharedPreferences.appIsEnable && !sharedPreferences.appIsForbidden
    90→    }
    91→}

     7→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.config.GlobalConstant

    18→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.network.SpiUnsettleBets

    21→import com.xuenn.bet188.data.ProductListEntity
    22→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.Constants
    23→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.ProductObject
    24→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.StatementBankingInfoObject
    25→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.StatementBetInfoObject
    26→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.StatementPromotionObject
    27→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.StatementSummaryObject
    28→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.database.StatementDaoChecked
    29→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.CommonUtils
    30→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.DateUtils
    31→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.Product
    32→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.ProductUtil
    33→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.Utils
    34→import java.time.LocalDate
    35→import java.time.ZoneId
    36→import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    37→import javax.inject.Singleton
    38→
    39→
    40→@Singleton
    41→class StatementRepository {
    42→
    43→    fun getBetProductListFromPref(context: Context, filter: Boolean): List<ProductObject> {
    44→        val productList = ProductUtil.getProductList(context, filter)
    45→        // Remove the Euro, it won't display in product list in statement
    46→        for (product in productList) {
    47→            if (product.productId == Product.EURO.productId
    48→                || product.productId == context.resources.getInteger(R.integer.product_key_promotions)
    49→            ) {
    50→                productList.remove(product)
    51→                break
    52→            }
    53→
    54→            //prevent new product added before app release
    55→            if (!ProductListEntity.mProductMappingHash.contains(product.productId)) {
    56→                productList.remove(product)
    57→            }
    58→        }
    59→        return productList
    60→    }
    61→
    62→    fun getBetTransList(): MutableList<GlobalConstant.STATEMENT_TRANS_TYPE> {
    63→        val list: MutableList<GlobalConstant.STATEMENT_TRANS_TYPE> = ArrayList()
    64→        list.add(GlobalConstant.STATEMENT_TRANS_TYPE.DEPOSIT)
    65→        list.add(GlobalConstant.STATEMENT_TRANS_TYPE.WITHDRAW)
    66→        list.add(GlobalConstant.STATEMENT_TRANS_TYPE.ADJUST)
    67→        list.add(GlobalConstant.STATEMENT_TRANS_TYPE.PROMOTION)
    68→
    69→        return list
    70→    }
    71→
    72→    /** StatementSummary **/
    73→    fun getStatementSummaryCache(context: Context, range: GlobalConstant.STATEMENT_TIME_RANGE): List<StatementSummaryObject> {
    74→        val cache = StatementDaoChecked.loadStatement(
    75→            context,
    76→            context.resources.getInteger(GlobalConstant.STATEMENT_ALL_TYPE.SUMMARY.statementKey),
    77→            statement_range = range
    78→        )
    79→
    80→        if (cache != null)
    81→            return Gson().fromJson(cache.result, object : TypeToken<List<StatementSummaryObject?>?>() {}.type)
    82→
    83→        return emptyList()
    84→    }
    85→
    86→    fun getStatementSummary(
    87→        context: Context,
    88→        range: GlobalConstant.STATEMENT_TIME_RANGE,
    89→        callback: SpiResponse<SpiSummary.Response>
    90→    ) {
    91→        val durationPair = Utils.getStatementDuration(range)
    92→

    29→@Singleton
    30→class MessageRepository(application: Application) : BaseRepository() {
    31→
    32→    private val appCtx = application.applicationContext
    33→
    34→    private val preferences = Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(appCtx)
    35→
    36→    fun fetchMessageList(

    40→        channelType: Int,

    58→        spi.input.id = CommonUtils.getTimestamp()
    59→        spi.input.body.token = preferences.user188token
    60→        spi.input.body.messageIdList = messageList
    61→        spi.post(context, handler, callback)
    62→    }
    63→
    64→    fun requestMessageStatus(
    65→        context: Context,
    66→        messageList: ArrayList<Long>,
    67→        messageStatus: MessageStatus,
    68→        callback: SpiResponse<SpiSetMessageStatus.Response>
    69→    ) {
    70→        val spi = SpiSetMessageStatus()
    71→        spi.input.id = CommonUtils.getTimestamp()
    72→        val token: String = preferences.user188token
    73→        spi.input.body.token = token
    74→        spi.input.body.messageIdList = messageList
    75→        spi.input.body.status = messageStatus.value
    76→        spi.post(context, handler, callback)
    77→    }

    85→        spi.input.body.token = preferences.user188token

    87→        spi.post(context, handler, callback)
    88→    }
    89→

    91→        val spi = SpiGetMessageDetail()
    92→        spi.input.id = CommonUtils.getTimestamp()
    93→        spi.input.body.token = preferences.user188token

    96→    }
    97→
    98→    fun replyMessage(
    99→        context: Context,
   100→        messageId: Long,

   108→        spi.input.body.messageIdToReply = messageId
   109→        spi.input.body.platform = PLATFORM_ANDROID.toLong()

1→package com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.database
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import androidx.room.Database
     5→import androidx.room.Room
     6→import androidx.room.RoomDatabase
     7→
     8→
     9→const val DATABASE_NAME = "188asia_database"
    10→const val DRAFT_TABLE = "drafts"
    11→const val STATEMENT_TABLE = "statement"
    12→const val DASHBOARD_ALERT_TABLE = "dashboard_alert"
    13→const val REGISTRATION_REGION_TABLE_NAME = "REGISTRATION_REGION_TABLE"
    14→const val REGISTRATION_CURRENCY_TABLE_NAME = "REGISTRATION_CURRENCY_TABLE"
    15→
    16→@Database(
    17→    entities = [
    18→        MessageDraftEntity::class,
    19→        StatementCache::class,
    20→        DashboardAlertCache::class,
    21→        RegistrationRegionCache::class,
    22→        RegistrationCurrencyCache::class
    23→    ],
    24→    version = 17
    25→)
    26→abstract class RoomDbHelper : RoomDatabase() {
    27→
    28→    abstract fun draftDao(): DraftDao
    29→    abstract fun statementDao(): StatementDao
    30→    abstract fun dashboardAlertDao(): DashboardAlertDao
    31→    abstract fun registrationRegionDao(): RegistrationRegionDao
    32→    abstract fun registrationCurrencyDao(): RegistrationCurrencyDao
    33→
    34→    fun clearOldUserData() {
    35→        // Run everything in a transaction to ensure atomic operation
    36→        runInTransaction {
    37→            draftDao().clearTable()
    38→            statementDao().deleteAllData()
    39→            dashboardAlertDao().deleteAllData()
    40→            // Add other tables you want to clear here
    41→        }
    42→    }
    43→
    44→    companion object {
    45→        @Volatile
    46→        private var INSTANCE: RoomDbHelper? = null
    47→
    48→        fun getInstance(context: Context): RoomDbHelper {
    49→            synchronized(this) {
    50→                var instance = INSTANCE
    51→                if (instance == null) {
    52→                    instance = Room.databaseBuilder(
    53→                        context.applicationContext,
    54→                        RoomDbHelper::class.java,
    55→                        DATABASE_NAME
    56→                    )
    57→                        .fallbackToDestructiveMigration()
    58→                        .allowMainThreadQueries()
    59→                        .build()
    60→                    INSTANCE = instance
    61→                }
    62→                return instance
    63→            }
    64→        }
    65→    }
    66→}

    59→        val imageViewLoading = view.findViewById<ImageView>(R.id.imageView_loading)
    60→        val dialog = ProgressDialog(context, R.style.loading_dialog)
    61→        dialog.setCancelable(cancelable)
    62→
    63→        val activity = context as? Activity ?: return dialog

    65→
    66→        Glide.with(activity)

    68→            .into(imageViewLoading)
    69→
    70→        dialog.show()

    24→@Singleton
    25→class MyAccountRepository : BaseRepository() {
    26→    fun getMyAccountList(context: Context, isEnableAccessPrivilegeClub: Boolean = false): MutableList<MyAccountMenuItemObject> {
    27→        val list: MutableList<MyAccountMenuItemObject> = ArrayList()
    28→
    29→        list.add(
    30→            MyAccountMenuItemObject(
    31→                title = if (isEnableAccessPrivilegeClub) StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.TXTVIPPRIVILEGECLUB) else StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.NAVACCOUNTDASHBOARD),

    53→                    StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.TXTSECURITYDESCRIPTION),
    54→                    path = context.getString(R.string.urlSecurity),
    55→                    itemTag = Constants.AccountDashboardMenuItem.Security.itemTag
    56→                )
    57→            )
    58→        }
    59→
    60→        list.add(
    61→            MyAccountMenuItemObject(
    62→                R.drawable.ic_account_my_rebates,
    63→                StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.TITREBATESROOT),
    64→                StringsRepository.getString(UiStr.TXTREBATESDESCONDASHBOARD),
    65→                path = context.getString(R.string.urlMyRebates),
    66→                itemTag = Constants.AccountDashboardMenuItem.MyRebates.itemTag
    67→            )
    68→        )
    69→
    70→        // TODO : CC1-3498 - Display this selection in next phase.
    71→//        if(Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context).enableMyReward) {
    72→//            list.add(

    84→        list.add(

    93→
    94→        if (showBankAccount(context)) {
    95→            list.add(

   102→                )

   106→        list.add(

   111→                GlobalConstant.MY_ACCOUNT_LAUNCH_TYPE.NATIVE,

   131→    fun getDashboardAlertList(

   139→        spi.post(context, callback)

   181→
   182→    private fun showBankAccount(context: Context): Boolean {
   183→        val mSharedPreferences = Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context)
   184→        val list: HashMap<String, List<String>> = HashMap()
   185→        list[ConstantsBet188.REGION_CHINA] = listOf("RMB")
   186→        list[ConstantsBet188.REGION_VIETNAM] = listOf("VND", "USD")
   187→        list[ConstantsBet188.REGION_CAMBODIA] = listOf("USD")
   188→        list[ConstantsBet188.REGION_INDONESIA] = listOf("IDR")
   189→        list[ConstantsBet188.REGION_KOREA] = listOf("KRW")
   190→        list[ConstantsBet188.REGION_THAILAND] = listOf("THB")
   191→        list[ConstantsBet188.REGION_JAPAN] = listOf("JPY")
   192→        list[ConstantsBet188.REGION_MALAYSIA] = listOf("MYR")
   193→        list[ConstantsBet188.REGION_INDIA] = listOf("INR", "USD")
   194→
   195→        if (list.containsKey(mSharedPreferences.userRegion)) {
   196→            val currencyList = list.getValue(mSharedPreferences.userRegion)
   197→            for (i in currencyList.indices) {
   198→                if (currencyList[i] == mSharedPreferences.userCurrency)
   199→                    return true
   200→            }
   201→        }

1→package com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.usecase
     2→
     3→import android.app.Application
     4→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.dialog.DialogUtil
     5→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.network.DomainLookUp.DomainCenterImpl2
     6→import com.xuenn.bet188.data.Bet188SharePreferences
     7→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.CommonUtils
     8→import javax.inject.Singleton
     9→
    10→@Singleton
    11→class CheckDomainUseCase(application: Application) {
    12→
    13→    private val appContext = application.applicationContext
    14→
    15→    private val preferences = Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(appContext)
    16→
    17→    suspend operator fun invoke(): CheckDomainResult {
    18→        // Cache the instance to avoid multiple lookups
    19→        val domainCenter = DomainCenterImpl2.getInstance(appContext)
    20→
    21→        // Wait for the background update to complete
    22→        domainCenter.initDomainFromCDN().join()
    23→
    24→        DialogUtil.reSetRetryCount()
    25→
    26→        // Ensure isDomainEmpty() is also @Synchronized in DomainCenterImpl2
    27→        return if (domainCenter.isDomainEmpty()) {
    28→            CheckDomainResult.DomainEmpty
    29→        } else {
    30→            preferences.setIsLogin(false)
    31→            CommonUtils.saveMemberSiteDomain(appContext)
    32→            CheckDomainResult.Complete
    33→        }
    34→    }
    35→
    36→    sealed class CheckDomainResult {
    37→
    38→        data object Complete : CheckDomainResult()
    39→
    40→        data object DomainEmpty : CheckDomainResult()
    41→    }
    42→}

content.content:
1→package com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.repo
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.network.SpiGetLobbyInfo
     5→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.network.SpiGetRegionTheme
     6→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.network.SpiResponse
     7→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.network.SpiSponsorSetting
     8→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.network.SpiSportsLaunchToken
     9→import com.xuenn.bet188.data.Bet188SharePreferences
    10→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.ProductObject
    11→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.ThemeObject
    12→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.CommonUtils
    13→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.Product
    14→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.ProductUtil
    15→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.convertJson
    16→
    17→
    18→class LobbyRepository : BaseRepository() {
    19→    fun fetchThemeDetail(context: Context): ThemeObject {
    20→        return if (Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context).regionThemeSettingDetail.isEmpty())
    21→            ThemeObject()
    22→        else {
    23→            convertJson<ThemeObject>(Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context).regionThemeSettingDetail)
    24→        }
    25→    }
    26→
    27→    fun fetchRegionTheme(context: Context, callback: SpiResponse<SpiGetRegionTheme.Response>) {
    28→        val spi = SpiGetRegionTheme()
    29→        spi.get(
    30→            context,
    31→            SpiGetRegionTheme.Query(
    32→                Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context).serverLangcode,
    33→                Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context).userRegion
    34→            ).toString(),
    35→            handler, callback
    36→        )
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    fun fetchLobbyInfo(context: Context, callback: SpiResponse<SpiGetLobbyInfo.Response>) {
    40→        val spi = SpiGetLobbyInfo()
    41→        spi.input.id = CommonUtils.getTimestamp()
    42→        spi.input.body.token = Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context).user188token
    43→        spi.input.body.langCode = Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context).serverLangcode
    44→        spi.post(context, handler, callback)
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    fun getSponsorData(context: Context, callback: SpiResponse<SpiSponsorSetting.Response>) {
    48→        val spi = SpiSponsorSetting()
    49→        spi.get(
    50→            context,
    51→            SpiSponsorSetting.Query(
    52→                Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context).serverLangcode,
    53→                Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context).userRegion
    54→            ).toString(),
    55→            handler, callback
    56→        )
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    // From Pref
    60→    fun getProductsFromPref(context: Context, filter: Boolean): List<ProductObject> {
    61→        val allProduct = ProductUtil.getProductList(context, filter)
    62→        // Remove the Euro, it won't display in product list in lobby
    63→        for (product in allProduct) {
    64→            if (product.productId == Product.EURO.productId) {
    65→                allProduct.remove(product)
    66→                break
    67→            }
    68→        }
    69→        return allProduct ?: emptyList()
    70→    }
    71→
    72→    fun getGameLaunchToken(context: Context, product: ProductObject, callback: SpiResponse<SpiSportsLaunchToken.Response>) {
    73→        val spi = SpiSportsLaunchToken()
    74→        spi.input.id = System.currentTimeMillis().toString()
    75→        spi.input.body.token = Bet188SharePreferences.getInstance(context).user188token
    76→        spi.input.body.productId = product.productId
    77→        spi.post(context, handler, callback)
    78→    }
    79→}

content.content:
1→package com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.contract
     2→
     3→import android.app.Activity
     4→import android.content.Context
     5→import android.content.Intent
     6→import androidx.activity.result.contract.ActivityResultContract
     7→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.Constants
     8→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.view.message.MessageDetailActivity
     9→import java.util.HashSet
    10→
    11→
    12→class MessageDetailContract : ActivityResultContract<MessageDetailInputBundles, MessageDetailOutputBundles>() {
    13→
    14→    override fun createIntent(context: Context, input: MessageDetailInputBundles): Intent {
    15→        return Intent(context, MessageDetailActivity::class.java).apply {
    16→            putExtra(Constants.BUNDLE_MESSAGE_CHANNEL_TYPE, input!!.channelType)
    17→            putExtra(Constants.BUNDLE_MESSAGE_LIST, input.msgList)
    18→            putExtra(Constants.BUNDLE_MESSAGE_POSITION, input.position)
    19→        }
    20→    }
    21→
    22→    override fun parseResult(resultCode: Int, intent: Intent?): MessageDetailOutputBundles {
    23→        if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
    24→            val readId = intent!!.getSerializableExtra(Constants.ACTION_RESULT_READED_ID)
    25→            val hasDelete = intent.getBooleanExtra(Constants.ACTION_RESULT_HAS_DELETE, false)
    26→            return MessageDetailOutputBundles(readId!!, hasDelete)
    27→        }
    28→
    29→        return MessageDetailOutputBundles(HashSet<Long>(), false)
    30→    }
    31→}

content.content:
1→package com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils
     2→
     3→import android.app.Activity
     4→import android.graphics.Color
     5→import android.os.Build
     6→import android.view.View
     7→import android.view.WindowInsetsController
     8→import androidx.core.view.ViewCompat
     9→
    10→fun Activity.setStatusBarColor(color:Int, view: View){
    11→    if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.R) {
    12→        val state = if (!isColorDark(color)) WindowInsetsController.APPEARANCE_LIGHT_STATUS_BARS else 0
    13→        window?.insetsController?.setSystemBarsAppearance(state, WindowInsetsController.APPEARANCE_LIGHT_STATUS_BARS)
    14→    } else {
    15→        ViewCompat.getWindowInsetsController(view).let { controller ->
    16→            controller?.isAppearanceLightStatusBars = true
    17→        }
    18→    }
    19→    window?.statusBarColor = color
    20→}
    21→
    22→private fun isColorDark(color:Int) : Boolean{
    23→    val darkness = 1 - (0.299 * Color.red(color) + 0.587 * Color.green(color) + 0.114 * Color.blue(color)) / 255
    24→    return darkness >= 0.5
    25→}

content.content:
1→package com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.viewmodel
     2→
     3→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
     4→import com.xuenn.bet188.comm.network.ErrorCode
     5→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.FindAccountEffect
     6→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.FindAccountUiState
     7→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.ForgotAccountResult.*
     8→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.SecurityCodeObject
     9→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.model.data.repo.ForgotAccountRepository
    10→import com.xuenn.bet188.revamp.utils.Utils
    11→import kotlinx.coroutines.channels.BufferOverflow
    12→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableSharedFlow
    13→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
    14→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.SharedFlow
    15→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
    16→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asSharedFlow
    17→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
    18→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.update
    19→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
    20→
    21→
    22→
    23→class FindAccountViewModel(private val repo: ForgotAccountRepository) : BaseViewModel() {
    24→
    25→    private val _state = MutableStateFlow(FindAccountUiState())
    26→    val state: StateFlow<FindAccountUiState> = _state.asStateFlow()
    27→
    28→    private val _effects = MutableSharedFlow<FindAccountEffect>(replay = 0, extraBufferCapacity = 1, onBufferOverflow = BufferOverflow.DROP_OLDEST)
    29→    val effects: SharedFlow<FindAccountEffect> = _effects.asSharedFlow()
    30→
    31→    fun onUsernameChanged(raw: String) {
    32→        val text = raw.trim()
    33→        val enable = if (text.contains("@")) {
    34→            Utils.isEmailFormatValid(text)
    35→        } else {
    36→            Utils.isUserNameValid(text)
    37→        }
    38→        _state.update { it.copy(
    39→            identity = text,
    40→            isNextEnabled = enable
    41→        ) }
    42→    }
    43→
    44→    fun onClickNext() {
    45→        val s = state.value
    46→        val identity = s.identity
    47→        if (!state.value.isNextEnabled || identity.isBlank()) return
    48→        viewModelScope.launch {
    49→            _state.update { it.copy(isLoading = true) }
    50→            when(val result = repo.forgotAccount(identity)) {
    51→                is Success -> {
    52→                    val data = result.data
    53→                    val securityCode = SecurityCodeObject().apply {
    54→                        userStatus = data.userStatus
    55→                        finalAction = data.finalAction
    56→                        if (data.apiCode == ErrorCode.ITGR0011) memberNotExist = true
    57→                    }
    58→                    _effects.tryEmit(
    59→                        FindAccountEffect.NavigateToSecurityCode(
    60→                            securityCodeData = securityCode,
    61→                            memberCodeOrEmail = identity,
    62→                            sendToEmail = data.sendToEmail,
    63→                            memberToken = data.memberToken,
    64→                            maxFailCount = data.maxFailCount,
    65→                            expiryTime = data.expiryTime
    66→                        )
    67→                    )
    68→                }
    69→                is ApiError -> {
    70→                    when(result.code) {
    71→                        ErrorCode.COMM0102 -> _effects.tryEmit(FindAccountEffect.ShowReachedLimitDialog)   // DEVICE_FUNCTION_EXCEED_LIMIT
    72→                        ErrorCode.CODE0101 -> _effects.tryEmit(FindAccountEffect.ShowGenerateErrorDialog)  // GENERATE_VERIFY_CODE_ERROR
    73→                        ErrorCode.CODE0105 -> _effects.tryEmit(FindAccountEffect.ShowPendingFinalDialog)   // SECURITY_CODE_PENDING_TO_FINAL
    74→                        ErrorCode.LOGN0003, // LOGIN_MEMBER_SELF_EXCLUDED
    75→                        ErrorCode.LOGN0021, // LOGIN_MEMBER_FAMILY_EXCLUDED
    76→                        ErrorCode.LOGN0022 -> _effects.tryEmit(FindAccountEffect.ShowAccountStatusDialog)  // LOGIN_MEMBER_PERMANENT_EXCLUDED
    77→                        ErrorCode.LOGN0007 -> _effects.tryEmit(FindAccountEffect.ShowProhibitedDialog)
    78→                        else -> {}
    79→                    }
    80→
    81→                }
    82→                is NetworkUnavailable -> {
    83→                    _effects.tryEmit(FindAccountEffect.ShowNetworkErrorDialog)
    84→                }
    85→
    86→            }
    87→            _state.update { it.copy(isLoading = false) }
    88→        }
    89→    }
    90→}
